title: #info
breadcrumbs: ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants
text: #info Produce a compiler information message. #info Text Parameters Text —compiler message text Description The #info directive causes the ProcScript compiler to generate an information message. The message Text appears in the Compiler Output tab, and the information message is added to the total for the module being compiled. Example The following example causes the ProcScript compiler to generate an information message if the compile-time constant <MYCONSTANT> has not been defined: #ifundefined MYCONSTANT #info The constant MYCONSTANT has not been defined. #endif Copy Related Links #error Produce a compiler error message. #warning Produce a compiler warning message.
